article_title: B.C. Reg. 238/2025 – College of Pharmacists of British Columbia

briefs.title: Nicotine Oral Pouches (≤4 mg) Removed from Prescription-Only Schedule in BC
briefs.summary: BC Reg. 238/2025 removes low-dose nicotine products (≤4 mg, buccal delivery via non-active device) from Schedule 2 of the Drug Schedules Regulation, effective December 15, 2025.
briefs.action_required: Review your nicotine product inventory and update scheduling classifications to reflect the deregulated status of ≤4 mg buccal nicotine products.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 238/2025 – College of Pharmacists of British Columbia
